## Linked Issue
Fixes #

## Description
Provide a clear description of the modifications made in this Pull Request.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (clean code updates, no behavior modifications)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Security patch

## Testing
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Include commands and details about your local setup.

## Screenshots (if UI changes are made)
Add screenshots or screen recordings demonstrating the visual changes before and after.

## Checklist
- [ ] This PR is submitted under ECSOC.
- [ ] Linked issue number added.
- [ ] Tested locally.
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build` completes successfully).
- [ ] No breaking changes (backward compatibility is fully maintained).
- [ ] Documentation updated if required (e.g. docs, readme, or comments).
- [ ] GitHub Actions checks pass.
